name: Mrs. Howard's Baked Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
5 cups if needed
Salt and cook the cabbage with very little water until tender. Drain well.
Grease a baking dish.
Alternate layers of cabbage, grated cheese (mix of longhorn and processed), white sauce, more cheese, and cornflake crumbs in the dish.
Bake at 350°F until heated through and cheese is golden brown. Serves: 6
Make medium white sauce by melting butter over low heat, adding flour, and cooking a few minutes. Add milk and stir constantly until thickened (about 10 minutes).
